events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: brazing done without nitrogen purge, black scale inside. This is a sequence/procedure violation. Work in progress. Need to fail. Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant. Risk high/critical. Need corrective actions: cut out contaminated sections, re-braze with nitrogen purge, then evacuate. Before work can continue, defective brazed joints must be reworked.

Let's produce JSON.

  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rework",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 30,

  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Brazing performed without nitrogen purge, producing black scale/oxidation inside copper lines",
    "Internal contamination will restrict flow and damage metering devices/compressors if left in place",
    "Procedure sequence violated: evacuation cannot proceed until contaminated joints are removed/reworked"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop brazing/evacuation work on affected lines",
    "Identify and cut out all joints brazed without nitrogen purge",
    "Rebraze with continuous nitrogen purge flowing through the lines",
    "Clean/flush lines to remove scale and flux/oxidation debris",
    "Install proper filter-driers if contamination may have reached components",
    "Perform pressure/leak test, then evacuate to required micron level before charging"
  ],
  "rationale": "Brazing copper refrigerant lines without an inert nitrogen purge creates internal oxide scale that contaminates the system. This is a non-compliant installation defect; the affected piping must be reworked before evacuation and charging can proceed.",
  "references": ["mfr specs", "ACCA", "EPA 608"]
}
